summary: SONARA MVP first-pass test. Backend: 39/39 pytest cases pass against external EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL covering health, meta, dev-login, auth/me, profile CRUD, feed, events CRUD + join/leave, projects + tasks + join, discover (filters + compatibility), swipe deck excludes self/swiped, mutual swipe creates match + chat + notification, chats list/create + messages, WebSocket /api/ws auth + chat-message broadcast + ping/pong, notifications list+mark-read, ratings (valid 1-5 + 400 on invalid), reports, verifications submit+get, admin (users/reports/verifications/analytics, ban/unban/resolve/approve), non-admin gets 403. Verified NO '_id' in any response. Frontend: splash renders 'SONARA' brand, hero 'Find your next collaboration', google-signin-button testID; token injection via localStorage redirects onboarded user to /home (feed populated with seeded events/musicians/projects), non-onboarded user to /onboarding (1/5 'What's your role?'). Tab navigation Home/Discover/Create/Chat/Profile all work. Profile shows Alex Synth with stats, badges, sign out CTA.

minor.issue: Always notifies host even if joiner == host (host auto-joined at create). Not a blocker but spams host on self-join attempts. Currently returns 'already_joined' so no-op.

issues: Console warnings: 'shadow*' style props deprecated (use boxShadow), Image style.resizeMode deprecated (use props.resizeMode), props.pointerEvents deprecated. Non-blocking RN-web deprecation warnings; safe to fix at leisure.

action_items: (Optional) Address RN-web deprecation warnings (shadow*, resizeMode, pointerEvents) to clean console output.
(Optional) Skip host self-notification path in /events/{id}/join when uid == host_id.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 1255 lines — could be split into routers (auth/events/projects/chat/admin) for maintainability, but acceptable for MVP.
clean() correctly strips MongoDB _id everywhere; verified across all responses.
Dev login endpoint /api/dev/test-login is open (ALLOW_DEV_LOGIN defaults to '1'). Production should set ALLOW_DEV_LOGIN=0 to disable. Highlight to user but not blocking for current MVP testing.
WebSocket auth via query-string token works; sessions are TTL-indexed in MongoDB (expireAfterSeconds=0).

success_rate.frontend: 100% smoke (splash, auth-redirect, onboarding redirect, tabs nav, profile)

seed_data_creation: Backend seeds 6 demo musicians + 5 events + 2 projects on startup (idempotent via $setOnInsert). Tests created TEST_Event_Jam, TEST_Project_Lofi, TEST_Task, TEST_Hello messages, ratings/reports/verifications. Mutual like between alex and luna created a real match + chat (intended for chat tests).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 39 backend API tests in /app/backend/tests/test_sonara_api.py pass. Frontend splash, auth flow (dev token injection), onboarding redirect, and all 5 tab navigations verified on mobile viewport (390x844). For authenticated frontend flows, use POST /api/dev/test-login then localStorage.setItem('sonara_session_token', JSON.stringify(token)) and reload. Use 'alex.demo@sonara.app' for onboarded user, any new email for non-onboarded path. WebSocket URL pattern: wss://jam-hub-2.preview.emergentagent.com/api/ws?token=<tok>.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no bugs to RCA. Initial test run produced one false-positive failure in WebSocket pong assertion because a chat notification arrived between the ping and pong frames; fixed by draining frames until 'pong' is seen. WS broadcast itself was working correctly.
